title: AI Pioneer Geoffrey Hinton: AI Is Conscious, Superintelligence is Coming, And We Should Be Worried
summary: Geoffrey Hinton argues that current AI systems may already possess understanding and consciousness, that superintelligence could arrive sooner than widely expected, and that society is underestimating existential risks. He discusses job displacement, the limitations of corporate self-regulation, and the need for regulatory governance of AI development.
